name: @gitgraph/js
when_to_use: 需要讲清多分支、提交与合并拓扑时用它,而非手写 SVG——原生手写在分支泳道布局、交叉合并边线和提交标签对齐上会失败。非做通用网络图,也非读取真实 Git 仓库。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能把简单三分支手绘到约 70%;复杂 merge/rebase 拓扑会错线、错父子关系,而库用 branch/commit/merge 原生 API 确定性排布 SVG。

data_in.note: commands 必须按拓扑顺序给出:先建父分支,再提交或建子分支,最后合并/打标签;这是对上游 branch/commit/merge/tag 调用序列的裁剪表达,不是通用图 schema。

commands.branch-when-kind-is-branch: { name:string, from?:string —— from 省略时默认从 gitgraph 根创建 }

spec.note: 几何图容器默认显式高 400px并允许滚动,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3);上游 SVG 仍按内容给 intrinsic size,长历史不会被强行压扁。

example._why: 提交 DAG 属高歧义时序配置;minimal 固定命令顺序,让 AI 一次拼对分叉与合并。

carriers.widget: supported:原生 SVG 仅挂入传入的 shadow 容器,无 document.head/CSS/worker/wasm 足迹
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + DOM/SVG,无 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: @gitgraph/js@1.4.0(10.7KB)+其依赖 @gitgraph/core@1.5.0(27KB)两 chunk grep 均彻底干净:0 document.head/body、0 createElement(style/link)、0 insertRule、0 document/window.addEventListener、0 Worker。SVG 仅渲入传入容器,commit tooltip 为容器内 SVG 元素(非 body portal),hover 事件挂在 SVG 节点(非全局)。

en.when_to_use: Use it to explain multi-branch commit and merge topology instead of writing SVG by hand, which fails at branch-lane layout, crossing merge edges, and commit-label alignment. Not for general networks and not for reading a real Git repository.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can hand-draw a simple three-branch graph to roughly 70% quality, but complex merge/rebase topology gets wrong edges and parent relationships; the library lays out SVG deterministically through its native branch/commit/merge API.

data_in.note: commands must follow topological order: create the parent branch first, then commit or create a child branch, and finally merge or tag. This is a focused representation of upstream branch/commit/merge/tag call sequences, not a general graph schema.

commands.branch-when-kind-is-branch: { name:string, from?:string -- When from is omitted, defaults to creation from the gitgraph root }

spec.note: The geometry container defaults to an explicit height of 400px with scrolling; vh and percentage heights are forbidden (rule 3). Upstream SVG keeps its intrinsic size, so long histories are not forcibly compressed.
